text: Last class you said it is sunny, it is rainy, it is cold.
When it is cold, what do you wear today?
I need new boots for the winter.
Can I try it on? What size do you have?
In summer I wear a light dress.
Good afternoon. Welcome to City Style. How can I help you?
Hello. It is cold now, so I need a warm jacket. How much is this one?
This jacket is one hundred reais. What size do you need?
Medium, please. Can I try it on?
Of course. The fitting room is near the door. Do you need boots too?
Yes, I need new boots and a scarf. Thank you for your help!
Can I try it on, please?

Hello, I am Gabriela, and I want to tell you what I wear in each season. In summer it is hot, so I wear a light dress and comfortable shoes. In autumn it is cool, so I wear a shirt and a soft scarf. In winter it is cold, so I wear a warm jacket, my boots, and gloves on my hands. In spring it is mild, so I wear a simple T-shirt and a thin jacket. My favorite clothes are my brown boots, because they are warm and they go with everything. What do you wear today?

Good afternoon, and welcome to City Style, your clothes store in São Paulo. Today we have a big sale on jackets, boots, and scarves. A warm winter jacket is one hundred reais, and a pair of boots is ninety reais. We have small, medium, and large sizes for every shirt and dress. You can try on any clothes in the fitting room near the door. If you need a different size, please ask one of our friendly assistants. Thank you for shopping with us, and have a wonderful day.

Gabriela went to the clothes store for a warm jacket. She found a blue jacket in her size. She asked the assistant, How much is this jacket? She tried the jacket on, and it was perfect. Finally, she paid for the jacket and went home happy.
It is cold, so I wear a warm jacket.
I need new boots for the winter.
Can I try it on, please?
In summer I wear a light dress.
